wiki.summary: “Manic!” was officially released on October 17, 2025. Like “What the hip hop hell is this ?” earlier in the year, this track was originally on the unreleased album, I HAVE FULFILLED MY CONTRACT! (Peggy’s initial vision for his 2021 album, LP!), which was known at that time as both FUCK PEGGY! and TOXIC!. Read more on Last.fm.
